title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd!
